title: `Azzah #5804
definition:
Azzah = "the strong"

 1) another name for 'Gaza', a city of the Philistines located in the
    extreme southwest of Palestine close to the Mediterranean
nasbUsage:
Definition: Azzah = "the strong"

 1) another name for 'Gaza', a city of the Philistines located in the
    extreme southwest of Palestine close to the Mediterranean

    NASB:  a Philistine city
